penalties.description: Task appears to be a knot tying demonstration rather than complete FLS Task 5. No visible suture placement through marked targets or completion.

reasoning: This video shows knot tying technique demonstration with purple suture material, but does not show the required FLS Task 5 components: no visible Penrose drain with marked targets, no suture placement through targets, and no completion of the full task sequence. The video ends with institutional credits rather than task completion. Cannot score as official FLS Task 5 attempt.
